scripts.lint: bunx --bun @biomejs/biome lint --config-path=./biome.json --files-ignore-unknown=true package.json biome.json README.md goose-word/src goose-word/test goose-word/package.json goose-word/tsconfig.json goose-word-plugins
scripts.lint:fix: bunx --bun @biomejs/biome check --config-path=./biome.json --write --files-ignore-unknown=true package.json biome.json README.md goose-word/src goose-word/test goose-word/package.json goose-word/tsconfig.json goose-word-plugins
scripts.bao:validate: bun run --cwd bao-source/goose-word-ui-bao bao:validate && bun run --cwd goose-word bao:validate
